content.text:
Classify this spine X-ray into one label: N, C, S, Unknown.
Definitions:
- N: non-scoliosis / normal (no meaningful lateral curve)
- C: one dominant scoliosis curve
- S: two dominant opposite scoliosis curves
- Unknown: unclear image or ambiguous anatomy

Return STRICT JSON object only:
{"label":"N|C|S|Unknown","confidence":0.0-1.0,"reason":"short"}
